zh.lifeSummary: 當Jordon de Humez於1136年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福時，他的父親Richard Du Hommet37歲，母親Agnes Saye25歲。他於大約1160年與Hawise de Crèvecoeur在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1192年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可舒寧咸享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jordon de Humez于1136年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福时，他的父亲Richard Du Hommet37岁，母亲Agnes Saye25岁。他于大约1160年与Hawise de Crèvecoeur在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1192年在英国英格兰諾福爾可舒寧咸享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Humez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham): variant of Hume , with excrescent -s, or a variant of Holmes .

variants.name: Hume
meanings: Scottish (Lowlands) and northern English: variant of Hulme , with loss of l before the bilabial consonant /m/, as in the vocabulary word calm. See Holm and Home .

Scottish: habitational name either from the barony of Home or from Hume (or Home) in Berwickshire, from which the barony took its name. The placename derives from Old English hōum, dative plural form of hōh ‘heel, spur of land’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) have held the Earldom of Home since 1605.

nameMeanings.name: Jordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Jordon de Humez was born in 1136, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Du Hommet, was 37 and his mother, Agnes Saye, was 25. He married Hawise de Crèvecoeur about 1160, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1192, in Sheringham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jordon de Humez est né en 1136, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Du Hommet, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes Saye, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Crèvecoeur environ 1160, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1192, à Sheringham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jordon de Humez 1136 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Du Hommet 37 und seine Mutter Agnes Saye 25. Er hat um 1160 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Hawise de Crèvecoeur geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1192 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Sheringham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jordon de Humez è nato il nel 1136 nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Du Hommet, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Saye, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Hawise de Crèvecoeur circa 1160, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1192, nel Sheringham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jordon de Humezが1136年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Du Hommetは37歳，母Agnes Sayeは25歳であった。約1160年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでHawise de Crèvecoeurと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1192年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェリンガムで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jordon de Humez(이)가 1136년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Du Hommet(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Saye(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Hawise de Crèvecoeur(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1192년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셔잉함에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jordon de Humez nasceu em 1136, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Du Hommet, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Saye, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise de Crèvecoeur aproximadamente 1160, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1192, em Sheringham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jordon de Humez родился в 1136 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Du Hommet было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Saye, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Crèvecoeur около 1160 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1192 г. в местности ширингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jordon de Humez nació en 1136, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Du Hommet, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Agnes Saye, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Hawise de Crèvecoeur aproximadamente 1160, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1192, en Sheringham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
